headline: Election Commission independence questioned after 3 boundary changes
context: The Election Commission's 3 constituency boundary redelineation exercises in 2024 were challenged in court for alleged partisan gerrymandering.

cards.big: 3 constituency boundary changes in 2024 challenged as partisan gerrymandering
cards.sub: EC independence questioned as all changes favoured ruling coalition areas

cards.big: Federal Constitution 13th Schedule governs constituency delineation process
cards.sub: EC members appointed by Yang di-Pertuan Agong on PM's recommendation

cards.big: Article 113 establishes EC as independent body for elections management
cards.sub: Appointment process raises concerns about true independence from executive

cards.big: Malapportionment ratio of 1:3.7 between largest and smallest constituencies
cards.sub: Rural overrepresentation means some votes carry 3.7 times more weight

cards.big: When 1 vote in one area equals 3.7 in another, electoral equality is fiction
Bersih 2.0 submitted 34-page objection to EC on boundary changes in 2024
